description: A product that was made in a small pilot-plant reactor now needs to be scheduled for its first full-scale production run.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved master batch record for the product.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the recipe and instructions for the product.

nodes.task_description: Use a system tool to scale the recipe quantities from the 100L pilot scale to the 5000L production scale.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully scales all raw material quantities by a factor of 50.

nodes.task_description: Create a new production order for the scaled-up batch on the large-scale reactor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the first full-scale production order.
